title: ivesia mollis
intro: Ivesia mollis, also known as silky ivesia, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant's roots and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, providing relief from pain, fever, and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Ivesia mollis is often combined with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
